about.bannerTitle: Empowering India's workforce through technology: Aajiveka, where careers begin!
about.missionText: At Aajiveka, our mission is to revolutionize the job search industry in India by providing a tech-driven platform that empowers job seekers and employers alike. We strive to make the job search process faster, easier, and more efficient, while creating a positive impact on the lives of millions by connecting them to their dream jobs.
about.visionText: Our vision is to become India's leading job portal and to be recognized as a global leader in the job search industry. We use the latest technological innovations to create a seamless, intuitive job search experience, fostering a community of talented professionals who can network, learn and grow together.
about.valueSubtext: We are committed to delivering the highest quality of service by upholding the following values:
about.customerCentricityText: We put our users at the center of everything we do, striving to exceed their expectations.
about.collaborationText: We build long-term relationships, working collaboratively with users, partners and employees.
about.innovationText: We continuously explore new technologies to improve our platform's functionality and experience.
about.transparencyText: We prioritize transparency and honesty in all our dealings with users and stakeholders.
about.diversityText: We create an inclusive platform promoting diversity, equity and accessibility for all.
about.whyChooseText: Looking for the right job? Look no further — Aajiveka can be your trusted partner. Here are the key highlights that make Aajiveka an optimum choice for users:
about.choose1: Our platform is designed to be user-friendly, with an intuitive interface that makes job search and recruitment a breeze.
about.choose2: We offer a wide range of job listings across various industries and skill sets, providing job seekers with diverse opportunities.
about.choose3: We prioritize the privacy and security of our users, with robust data encryption and secure servers to protect user data.
about.choose4: Our platform uses advanced AI algorithms and data analytics to match job seekers with the right opportunities.
about.choose5: We are committed to providing exceptional customer service, with a dedicated team available to assist with any queries.
about.industryHeading: What Makes Us Best In The Recruitment Industry?
about.industryText: At Aajiveka, we take pride in being at the forefront of the recruitment industry, providing cutting-edge solutions to both candidates and companies.
about.industry1Text: We assign dedicated AI-powered assistants to candidates to help them create impressive resumes for free, showcasing their skills in the best possible way.
about.industry2Text: Our recruitment process matches the skills of candidates with job requirements, with filters to quickly narrow down the best-suited options.
about.industry3Text: Getting started with Aajiveka is simple. Candidates can sign up and start applying for jobs right away by uploading a resume and documents.
about.industry4Text: We do not sell candidates' databases to corporates and big firms, and take all measures to keep information secure and confidential.
about.industry5Text: Our AI-powered support team is available around the clock — guidance, career options, resume writing, feedback, courses and more.

contact.infoText: Email us with any questions or inquiries, or call us. We would be happy to answer your questions and set up a meeting with you. Whenever you need us, we're here for you.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We will get back to you shortly.

resume.aiBuilderText: Generate a polished, professional resume in minutes with intelligent content suggestions.
resume.atsOptimizedText: Templates engineered to pass Applicant Tracking Systems and reach real recruiters.
resume.multipleTemplatesText: Choose from a range of modern, recruiter-approved designs tailored to your industry.

subscription.benefit2: Build a standout resume with our AI-powered resume builder
subscription.benefit3: Apply to unlimited jobs matched to your skills
subscription.benefit4: Receive personalized job alerts and career guidance
subscription.benefit5: Track every application from apply to interview
